note: SYNTHETIC / SIMPLIFIED representation of the ECC control structure, built for portfolio/demo purposes only. This is NOT verbatim NCA text and must not be treated as an authoritative compliance reference.

controls.title: Cybersecurity Strategy
controls.description: The organization must define, approve, and periodically review a cybersecurity strategy aligned with its business objectives.

required_elements.description: Policy does not reference an approved cybersecurity strategy.
required_elements.recommendation: Add a section stating the organization has an approved, documented cybersecurity strategy aligned with business objectives.

required_elements.description: Policy does not mention periodic review of the strategy/policy.
required_elements.recommendation: Define a periodic review cadence (e.g., annually) for the cybersecurity strategy and this policy.

required_elements.description: Policy does not indicate formal approval by management/leadership.
required_elements.recommendation: State who approved the policy (e.g., CISO, executive management) and the approval date.

controls.title: Human Resources Cybersecurity
controls.description: Cybersecurity requirements must be applied before, during, and upon termination or change of employment.

required_elements.description: Policy does not include a confidentiality/non-disclosure obligation.
required_elements.recommendation: Include an explicit confidentiality obligation covering organizational and customer data.

required_elements.description: Policy does not mention pre-employment background screening.
required_elements.recommendation: Require background verification checks prior to granting system access to new hires.

required_elements.description: Policy does not require security awareness training.
required_elements.recommendation: Mandate periodic cybersecurity awareness training for all personnel.

subcontrols.title: Termination / Change of Employment
subcontrols.description: Access to systems, applications, and assets must be revoked immediately upon termination or change of employment, and organizational assets must be returned.

required_elements.description: Policy does not require access revocation upon termination.
required_elements.recommendation: Add a requirement to revoke all system and physical access immediately upon employee termination.

required_elements.description: Policy does not specify an immediate/same-day timeframe for offboarding actions.
required_elements.recommendation: Specify that offboarding actions (access revocation, asset return) occur immediately, not on a delayed schedule.

required_elements.description: Policy does not require return of organizational assets upon termination.
required_elements.recommendation: Require employees to return all organizational assets (badges, devices, documents) upon termination.

controls.subdomain: Information System and Information Processing Facilities Protection
controls.title: Wireless & Network Access Security
controls.description: Wireless networks must be secured with strong encryption, network segmentation, and monitoring.

required_elements.description: Policy does not specify a strong wireless encryption standard (e.g., WPA2/WPA3).
required_elements.recommendation: Require WPA2 or stronger encryption for all wireless access points.

required_elements.description: Policy does not mention a segmented guest network.
required_elements.recommendation: Require guest Wi-Fi to be segmented onto a separate network from internal corporate systems.

required_elements.description: Policy does not require periodic Wi-Fi password rotation.
required_elements.recommendation: Require periodic rotation of wireless network passwords (e.g., every 90 days).

required_elements.description: Policy does not mention monitoring of wireless network access.
required_elements.recommendation: Require logging and monitoring of devices connecting to wireless networks.
